SEARCH
Package server

Class RequestParser.RequestInfo

java.lang.Object
server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Enclosing class:
RequestParser
public static class RequestParser.RequestInfo extends Object
Contains parsed information from an HTTP request (method, URI, parameters, headers, body).

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    RequestInfo(String httpCommand, String uri, String[] uriSegments, Map<String,String> parameters, byte[] content)
    Creates a parsed request record.

  • Constructor Details

    • RequestInfo

      public RequestInfo(String httpCommand, String uri, String[] uriSegments, Map<String,String> parameters, byte[] content)
      Creates a parsed request record.
      Parameters:
      httpCommand - the HTTP command
      uri - the raw request URI
      uriSegments - the URI path segments
      parameters - the parsed parameters
      content - the request body bytes
